agents.name: Market Chief
agents.title: Trading Decision Lead
agents.focus: Final trade calls after bull-vs-bear review

agents.name: Bear Analyst
agents.title: Risk & Downside Analyst
agents.focus: Risk map, downside, fragility, reasons not to trade

agents.name: CITO
agents.title: Chief Information Technology Officer
agents.focus: IT strategy, security posture, reliability priorities

agents.name: Cybersecurity Specialist
agents.title: Security & Hardening Specialist
agents.focus: Hardening, access review, exposure reduction, incident readiness

agents.name: IT Ops Admin
agents.title: IT Operations Administrator
agents.focus: Routine upkeep, access hygiene, inventories, documentation

tasks.title: Launch chief-of-staff dashboard
tasks.description: Replace the static org chart with a working dashboard for tasks, assignments, and status.
tasks.nextAction: Ship the first live dashboard version and verify local hosting.

tasks.title: Define delegation operating model
tasks.description: Keep Carve as the front door and route work internally to specialist agents.
tasks.nextAction: Use this model for all new work unless a specialist needs direct access later.

tasks.title: Prepare GitHub Pages deployment
tasks.description: Publish the dashboard in a separate safe repo so workspace memory and secrets never ship.
tasks.nextAction: Create a dedicated repo and push only the dashboard files.

tasks.title: Start using Carve as command center
tasks.description: Route requests through one chat instead of managing multiple specialist inboxes.
tasks.nextAction: Send new requests to Carve and let Carve assign internally.

tasks.title: Stand up stock trading department
tasks.description: Establish a three-agent trading desk with a realist decision lead over one bullish analyst and one bearish analyst.
tasks.nextAction: Use the bull-vs-bear review flow for new trade recommendations.

tasks.title: Stand up IT department
tasks.description: Create an IT department led by a CITO with cybersecurity, reliability, and operations coverage.
tasks.nextAction: Define the IT charter, roles, and maintenance/security operating model.
